sections.paragraph:
τετρακισχίλιοι, αι, α (Hdt., Aristoph. et al.; LXX; GkBar 6:7; Jos., Bell. 2, 501, Vi. 371) four thousand Mt 15:38; 16:10; Mk 8:9, 20; Ac 21:38.—M-M.

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

GkBar GkBar , s. GrBar—List 2

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1001
